archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) modified for Soft SaaS Trust
design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. Light base for better readability in forms/tables. Blue used as a semantic accent for primary actions, active navigation, and selected states.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: F-pattern for metrics, dense but breathable. Generous padding in cards (p-6/p-8).
layout_and_spacing.containers: p-6 md:p-8 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 bg-white h-screen fixed hidden md:flex flex-col z-40

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 bg-transparent text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

components.cards: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
components.inputs: rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 outline-none transition-all
components.table_header: text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-slate-500 bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200
components.chatbot_widget: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-80 sm:w-96 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden flex flex-col z-50

badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-emerald-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-emerald-800
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-amber-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-amber-800
badges.error: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-red-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-red-800
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-slate-100 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium text-slate-800

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly set hover colors (e.g., hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-blue-600).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for buttons and cards.

hero_background.description: Minimalist white and light blue 3d abstract background, geometric shapes

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 contrast for text. Do not use pure transparent backgrounds over content.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Never use raw inline CSS.
Component files should be .js using modern React functional components.
Use standard HTML tags augmented with Tailwind classes for layout instead of rigid container components when custom layout is required.
Shadcn/UI should be utilized for complex interactive elements (Dialog, Select, Dropdown Menu) but styled according to these guidelines. For date pickers, strictly use Shadcn Calendar.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes for testing.
Maintain strict spacing using the standard Tailwind spacing scale. Err on the side of generous padding (p-6, p-8) for dashboard cards to avoid cramped UI.
Implement the Chatbot UI as a fixed widget in the bottom right, using a clean rounded rectangle with subtle shadow and header with brand blue.
Avoid the default 'Inter' font for headings; stick to Outfit for headers and Plus Jakarta Sans for body text. Do not use Space Grotesk.
Never use placeholders for images; strictly use the URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
Go cardless or use rectangular, dense styles for dashboards rather than relying heavily on default Shadcn cards.
